ollama.name: Ollama
ollama.notes: Local models via Ollama. No API key needed. Start with: ollama serve

lm_studio.name: LM Studio
lm_studio.notes: Local models via LM Studio. No API key needed. Start server in LM Studio app.

vllm.name: vLLM
vllm.notes: Self-hosted vLLM server. Default port 8000. API key optional if configured.

openrouter.name: OpenRouter
openrouter.notes: Proxy to multiple LLM providers. Get key at: https://openrouter.ai

openai.name: OpenAI
openai.notes: OpenAI GPT models. Get key at: https://platform.openai.com/api-keys

anthropic.name: Anthropic
anthropic.notes: Claude models via OpenAI-compatible proxy. Get key at: https://console.anthropic.com

alibaba.name: Alibaba Cloud (Qwen / DashScope)
alibaba.notes: Qwen models via Alibaba DashScope. Get key at: https://dashscope.console.aliyun.com

portkey.name: Portkey
portkey.notes: AI gateway with observability and routing. Get key at: https://app.portkey.ai

eden_ai.name: Eden AI
eden_ai.notes: Multi-provider AI gateway. Get key at: https://app.edenai.run

byteplus.name: BytePlus (Doubao / Ark)
byteplus.notes: Doubao / Skylark models via ByteDance Volcano Ark. Get key at: https://console.volcengine.com/ark

tatoeba.name: Tatoeba Translation Challenge
tatoeba.description: Realistic sentence-pair data for ~400 language pairs, including EN<>ES, EN<>FR, EN<>DE, EN<>ZH, EN<>AR. Designed for low-resource and multilingual MT evaluation.

xnli.name: XNLI (Cross-lingual NLI)
xnli.description: Claims and entailment/contradiction labels in 15 languages including EN, FR, ES, DE, RU, AR, ZH. Useful as a constrained multilingual test bed for cross-lingual and translation-like evaluation.

wmt.name: WMT Public MT Evaluations
wmt.description: Annual shared translation tasks with high-quality human-translated test sets for major pairs: EN<>DE, EN<>FI, EN<>FR, EN<>CS, EN<>ZH, EN<>RU. Suitable for high-resource BabelScore directions.

ccaligned.name: CCAligned / WikiMatrix / CCMatrix
ccaligned.description: Large aligned multilingual corpora spanning dozens of language pairs. Often used to create MT test sets or domain-specific slices for evaluation.

openmt.name: OpenMT / Custom.MT Dataset Catalog
openmt.description: Curated catalog of 100+ open datasets for training and evaluating translation models, including many of the above plus additional language pairs suitable for BabelScore test data.
